subcodes.first_line: ...The extensive letter you had written about Stuttgart was perused. In brief, Germany will shine resplendent, inasmuch as its citizens are religiously minded
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه مفصل که در خصوص استتکارت نوشته بودی ملاحظه گردید مختصر این است
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
